_meta.description: Original multiple-choice agronomy questions authored for this repo (AgriEval-style). NOT derived from any external dataset — see THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md.

cases.question: Which crop family is best known for biological nitrogen fixation via root-nodule bacteria?

cases.answer: Protect and improve soil between cash crops

cases.question: Which of these is a direct input to photosynthesis?

cases.answer: Combining monitoring, thresholds, and multiple control tactics

cases.answer: Delivers water efficiently near the root zone
